block_00: Welcome to the One Trillion Club
block_01: In August of 2018, Apple was the first company in the world to enter a new club; The $1 Trillion Club.
block_02: Unfortunately this exclusive membership, although a first in history, was not long lived, & Apple has since been battling to climb back to the top.
block_03: Currently, the top three companies by market-cap are; Microsoft, with $1000 billion - Amazon, with $948 billion - closely followed by Apple, with $946 billion.
block_04: Microsoft is now the second company to join the much coveted spot. The company’s stock showed strong gains following their fiscal 3rd Quarter Earnings Report. In numbers; Microsoft reported a net income of $8.81 billion, compared to $7.42 billion (last year) & $1.14 a share, compared with 0.95 cents a share (last year)
block_05: NASDAQ houses all three giants, who are leaders of their fields in their own right.
block_06: Which of the three do you have your sights set on?
